hooks.description: PHI Guard: Blocks access to protected health information

hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'cat|head|tail|less|more' && echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'clinical|patient|mrn|\.nrrd|\.dcm|/Volumes/'; then echo '[PHI GUARD] WARNING: Potential PHI access via Bash. Use Read tool for proper PHI protection.'; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/pre_commit_check.sh 2>/dev/null || echo '[Hook] Pre-commit checks found issues'; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.yaml|config'; then echo '[Hook] Config file detected - will validate reproducibility requirements'; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.yaml$'; then python3 ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/validate_config.py "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'Session Log'; then echo '[Hook] Session log updated'; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'python.*analysis|run-analysis'; then echo '[Hook] Analysis complete - consider updating vault/Home.md and running --validate'; fi
